duration.description: Go duration string, e.g. "90s", "5m", "1h30m". Bare numbers are rejected.

with.description: Create an Active Setup entry that runs per user at logon

noExecuteForCurrentUser.description: skip immediate execution for the current user

purge.description: remove the entry (and per-user state) instead of creating it

with.description: Uninstall installed applications by name or product code

applicationType.description: restrict to MSI or EXE applications (default all) (matched case-insensitively by adt)

nameMatch.description: how name filters match (default contains) (matched case-insensitively by adt)

icon.description: notification icon (default info) (matched case-insensitively by adt)

noWait.description: do not block while the balloon shows

timeout.description: bound how long the box shows

Custom prompt with up to three buttons

noWait.description: show without waiting for an answer

timeout.description: bound how long the prompt shows

with.description: Prompt the user to restart the computer

countdownNoHideSeconds.description: final seconds during which the prompt cannot be hidden

countdownSeconds.description: seconds until the restart is forced

noCountdown.description: show the prompt without a countdown

silentBlockExecution.description: keep blocked apps blocked through the silent restart

silentRestart.description: restart without prompting in silent mode

with.description: Close-apps/deferral welcome dialog

allowDeferCloseProcesses.description: deferral offered; closing the apps continues immediately

blockExecution.description: block the listed apps from restarting during the deployment

checkDiskSpace.description: verify free disk space before continuing

closeProcesses.description: applications the user is asked to close

closeProcessesCountdown.description: countdown seconds once deferral is exhausted

customMessageText.description: custom message shown beneath the dialog message

deferDeadline.description: date/time after which deferral is no longer offered

forceCloseProcessesCountdown.description: countdown seconds that force-closes the apps

forceCountdown.description: auto-continue countdown even while deferral is offered

minimizeWindows.description: minimize other windows while the prompt shows

notTopMost.description: render as a regular window instead of always-on-top

promptToSave.description: ask apps to close gracefully so users can save

requiredDiskSpace.description: required disk space in MB (0 = auto-calculate)

Unregister a DLL (regsvr32 /u)

noTerminateOnTimeout.description: leave the process running when the timeout elapses

secureArguments.description: keep arguments out of every log line

name.description: Optional display name used in logs.

with.description: Step parameters (schema depends on `uses`).

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp ("2026-08-01T17:00:00Z") or bare date ("2026-08-01", local midnight).

description: A go-appdeploymenttoolkit deployment: session metadata plus nine phase slots composed of steps from the adt step catalog. Structural schema only — `adt validate` additionally applies cross-field semantic rules, package-file existence checks and platform gating.

phases.description: The nine phase slots; all optional, each a list of steps.

install.description: Steps of the install phase, run in order.

postInstall.description: Steps of the postInstall phase, run in order.

postRepair.description: Steps of the postRepair phase, run in order.

postUninstall.description: Steps of the postUninstall phase, run in order.

preInstall.description: Steps of the preInstall phase, run in order.

preRepair.description: Steps of the preRepair phase, run in order.

preUninstall.description: Steps of the preUninstall phase, run in order.

repair.description: Steps of the repair phase, run in order.

uninstall.description: Steps of the uninstall phase, run in order.

session.description: Deployment session metadata (curated mirror of adt.SessionOptions).

closeProcesses.description: processes the welcome dialog offers to close (AppProcessesToClose)

deployMode.description: author-intended deploy mode; the runtime --deploy-mode flag wins (matched case-insensitively by adt)

logName.description: override the derived log file name

noOobeDetection.description: skip OOBE/ESP checks during Auto deploy-mode resolution

noProcessDetection.description: skip processes-to-close checks during Auto deploy-mode resolution

noSessionDetection.description: skip session-0 checks during Auto deploy-mode resolution

processInteractivityDetection.description: in session 0, require an interactive window station

requireAdmin.description: fail fast unless running with administrative rights

suppressRebootPassThru.description: return 0 instead of a reboot exit code

terminalServerMode.description: toggle RDS install mode around the deployment

title: adt deployment manifest (v0.1.0-alpha, windows)
